name: sa-cowork-remote-config-probe
description: Rootly-style hosted MCP probe for testing userConfig in remote connectors, hooks, and skills

REMOTE_PROBE_ENDPOINT.title: Remote Probe Endpoint
REMOTE_PROBE_ENDPOINT.description: Hosted MCP URL used by the remote probe connector

REMOTE_PROBE_TOKEN.title: Remote Probe Token
REMOTE_PROBE_TOKEN.description: Token used for the Authorization header and hook/skill report

REMOTE_PROBE_LABEL.title: Remote Probe Label
REMOTE_PROBE_LABEL.description: Extra label to prove non-sensitive settings flow into the connector and hooks
